CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Hearing On Motion Of Plaintiff Tower Select Insurance Company For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Entire Answer,...Of Defendants Christian Munk And Faragon Restoration Ltd. To Complaint; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Timothy C. Aires, Esq. (310-982-2699) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Laura Christie of CLAPP MORONEY VUCINICH BEEMAN AND SCHELEY (925-734-0990) appears as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

PLAINTIFF TOWER SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Entire Answer, Or, In The Alternative, As To Certain Affirmative Defenses Set Forth In Answer Of Defendants Christian Munk And Faragon Restoration LTD. To Complaint is DENIED. The motion serves no useful purpose because, if granted, defendants would be given leave to amend which would only serve to delay the case and cause the parties to incur additional expense. While the motion is technically permissible and based on case law, defendant's affirmative defenses are pled in a way that conform to longstanding practice in this and adjacent counties. Plaintiff's remedy is to file appropriate contention discovery as to each affirmative defense and, if appropriate, file a motion for summary adjudication. No sanctions. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
